title: Kalevala: Vainamoinen's Kantele
description: The sage Vainamoinen builds the kantele from a pike's jawbone and plays so beautifully that all of nature weeps.
introduction: The sage Vainamoinen builds the kantele from a pike's jawbone and plays so beautifully that all of nature weeps.

translation.original_text: Soitti vanhat, soitti nuoret. Ei ollut sitä metsässä, jok' ei kuulohon tulisi.
translation.text: He played for old and young. There was nothing in the forest that did not come to listen.
